violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee that is certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application provided during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The ceiling in the food preparation area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment is to replace ceiling tiles with those that meet the requirements for food service; smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2026
